---
title: "Results"
---

See [MANUSCRIPT_DRAFT.md](MANUSCRIPT_DRAFT.md) for the formal Results section.

This book chapter will host:

- Embedded primary TOST figure
- Embedded GLASSO networks per arm × window with NCT P annotations
- Embedded pain–motor coupling figure (`Figure26b_pain_motor_coupling_matched`)
- Embedded genetics × DBS forest (`Figure25_genetics_forest`)

(Stub — to be filled in.)
